title: Brand Pages — Add İlgili Hizmetlerimiz to pages without service references
description:
For brand pages that have neither a "## Hizmetler" section nor external link-card sections, add a new "## İlgili Hizmetlerimiz" CardGroup section at the end of the page (before any external link-card sections if present, otherwise at the very end).

Determine which services are relevant by:
1. Reading the brand page's content to understand what products/services it describes
2. Cross-referencing with service pages (hizmetlerimiz/*.mdx) that list this brand in their "İlgili Markalar" or brand listing sections
3. Mapping the brand's described capabilities to the most logical service page(s)

Pages to process: vitra.mdx, burak.mdx, nobo.mdx, warmeks.mdx (NOT varmeks.md), radyal.mdx, rain-bird.mdx, sukar.mdx, pimtas.mdx, element.mdx, ph-mekanik.mdx, baylan.mdx, tse.mdx, tekneciler.mdx, sanihydro.mdx

Each Card should use: <Card title="Service Name" href="/hizmetlerimiz/{slug}"></Card> (omit icon).

If the page already has any content at the very end (like a "Tüm Markalar | Hizmetlerimiz" footer), place the new "## İlgili Hizmetlerimiz" section BEFORE that content.

steps.name: Process pages where brand is listed in a service page's brand listing (7 pages)
Process energy/heating/pump brands (5 pages with analytical mapping)

log.action: Auto-recovered orphaned planning task — agent session lost, cleared for re-planning

log.outcome: A thorough, well-researched specification for adding `## İlgili Hizmetlerimiz` CardGroup sections to 14 brand pages. Service mappings are logically sound and verified against actual file content and cross-references in service pages. Each step has concrete, verifiable outcomes. The one minor issue is a count inconsistency ("15" vs "14") that does not affect implementation correctness.
